heading: Short title
label: 5321 Short title
text: This subchapter may be cited as the “International Debt Management Act of 1988”.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle B (§§ 3101–3123) of title III of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of subtitle B to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 100–418102 Stat. 1375Aug. 23, 1988
